name: Cayl Blasingame
bio: Cayl is the Publisher and Editor-in-Chief of The Junto Press, where he provides rigorous political and cultural commentary as well as in-depth analysis of current events. He is a Conservative, Right-Wing, Catholic who is currently pursuing a degree in Electrical Engineering. A Patriotic Nationalist who critiques ideas from both sides of the aisle, willing the good of America as a whole.

name: Nick Ellis
bio: Nick is a critical cultural analyst, with an interest in historical accuracy and the social implications of contemporary issues. He is pursuing a degree in Accounting with a passion for politics and commitment to intellectual rigor.
